docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MATZ, JOSH AS TO DEFENDANT GEORGE, VICTORIA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,706.74 FILED BY MATZ, JOSH AS TO DEFENDANT GEORGE, VICTORIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT ADDRESS CHANGE (PLAINTIFF GAVE, IN COURT ON DEC-13-2021, AN ORAL DECLARATION FOR DEFENDANT'S CURRENT MAILING ADDRESS. PLAINTIFF WILL FOLLOW-UP WITH A WRITTEN DECLARATION) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MATZ, JOSH
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (SERVICE FEE $40) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MATZ, JOSH AS TO DEFENDANT GEORGE, VICTORIA
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF MATZ, JOSH
ORDER CONTINUED TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT A TIMELY ZOOM REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2022 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$9.00) SERVED NOV-11-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GEORGE, VICTORIA
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF MATZ, JOSH
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **DENIED** UNTIMELY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-12-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF JOSH MATZ IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT VICTORIA GEORGE IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF ALLOWED TO CONTINUE CASE TO SUBMIT A TIMELY ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST. PLAINTIFF INFORMED THAT PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE IS TWO DAYS UNTIMELY AND WOULD HAVE TO BE CONTINUED TO BE CURED ALSO. PLAINTIFF GAVE AN ORAL DECLARATION FOR DEFENDANT'S CURRENT MAILING ADDRESS. PLAINTIFF WILL FOLOW-UP WITH A WRITTEN DECLARATION (ALONG WITH ZOOM REQUEST TO THE COURT). NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) (HEARING SET FOR JAN-12-21 AT 3:30PM) (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MATZ, JOSH
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. (HEARING SET FOR JAN-12-2022 AT 3:30PM)
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MATZ, JOSH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-12-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-12-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JOSH MATZ IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT VICTORIA GEORGE IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MATZ, JOSH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEORGE, VICTORIA $3,706.74 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,846.74 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
